nasb.text: Then the Lord will single him out for adversity from all the tribes of Israel, according to all the curses of the covenant which are written in this book of the law.

esv.text: And the Lord will single him out from all the tribes of Israel for calamity, in accordance with all the curses of the covenant written in this Book of the Law.

cnv.text: 耶和華必照著寫在這律法書上的約的一切咒詛，把他從以色列眾支派中分別出來，使他遭受災禍。

ccb.text: 耶和华必把他从以色列各支派中隔离出来，使他按律法书上约中的一切咒诅受惩罚。
